description: Model must issue two independent tool calls in a single turn — one to retrieve a user profile and one to retrieve their account's subscription plan — without serialising them. Tests parallel dispatch of unrelated lookups that share only a loose contextual connection.
prompt: I need to display the dashboard for user ID 'usr_8f3k2p' who belongs to account 'acc_9d1m7r'. Fetch their profile and their subscription plan at the same time using the available tools.

toolDefinitions.name: get_user_profile
toolDefinitions.description: Retrieves a user's profile details including name, email, role, and account membership.

toolDefinitions.name: get_subscription_plan
toolDefinitions.description: Returns the current subscription plan, billing cycle, and feature entitlements for an account.
